meta.title: Dig Through Earth
meta.description: Where would you come out if you dug straight through the Earth? Find out on a map and globe!

header.title: Dig Through Earth
header.subtitle: Where would you come out on the other side?

switchTo.kid: Switch to kid look (currently standard mode)
switchTo.standard: Switch to standard look (currently kid mode)

view.mapAriaLabel: Map of Earth. Tap or click to pick a starting spot.
view.globeAriaLabel: Interactive 3D globe. Tap or click anywhere to pick a spot.
view.globeUnsupported: Your browser can't run the 3D globe. Try the 2D map instead!

drilling.title: Drilling through Earth…
drilling.sub: Hold tight, this takes a moment

locator.heading: Where are you right now?
locator.subtitle: Pick a spot - we'll dig straight through Earth and show you where you'd come out.

autocomplete.noResults: No matching cities. Try a different spelling.
autocomplete.error: Couldn't reach the city list - just press Search.

errors.denied: No worries - type your coordinates below.
errors.unsupported: Your browser can't share your location. Try typing coordinates instead.
errors.timeout: That took too long. Try again or type coordinates.
errors.missing: Type both a latitude and a longitude.
errors.noMatch: Couldn't find that place. Try another spelling or tap the map.

results.heading: Your antipode
results.placeholder: Pick a spot to see where you'd come out.
results.funFactAntipode: This spot is called your antipode!
results.funFactWater: If you're in Europe, your antipode is in the ocean 97% of the time!

footer.credits: Made with curiosity for kids who like to dig.

quiz.heading: Quick quiz!
quiz.intro: Ten questions about Earth, oceans, and antipodes. Ready?

end.tierPerfect: Whoa - a perfect score! You're a real Earth detective.
end.tierHigh: Brilliant - you really are a geography explorer!
end.tierMid: Nice digging - you know your planet pretty well!
end.tierLow: Try again, adventurer - the Earth has more secrets to share!

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.heading: Lost in the tunnel
notFound.message: Looks like you dug the wrong way!

banner.title: Add Dig Earth to your home screen
banner.body: Tap once - it opens like a real app, no app store needed.

modal.title: Install Dig Earth on iPhone
modal.step1: Tap the Share icon at the bottom of Safari.

installed.toast: Dig Earth added to your home screen!
